title: A Better Foods
description: This mod adds a rich culinary experience to the game, from classic desserts to authentic delicacies from around the world!
body:
## 📃 Overview

Are you tired of the monotonous food choices in Minecraft? This mod adds a rich culinary experience to the game, from classic desserts to authentic delicacies from around the world.
The mod is still under continuous development – more delicious foods are on the way!

## 🥧 Core Content

**Classic Apple Pie / Potion Series**

Apple Pie – The classic food of the mod, more filling than a plain apple.

Golden Apple Pie – Gleaming with a golden luster. Provides short-term Absorption and Regeneration after eating.

Enchanted Golden Apple Pie – The legendary ultimate dessert, granting powerful stat boosts and special effects. Crafted by surrounding a Golden Apple Pie with 8 gold blocks.

Magic Potion – Drink it to unlock the “How Did We Get Here?” advancement!

**Global Culinary Journey (continuously expanding)
The mod will keep adding authentic specialties from around the world, such as:**

Guangdong, China – Rice noodle rolls, phoenix claws, roast goose, char siu, white-cut chicken, etc.

Beijing, China – Beijing bean juice, Peking duck, shredded pork in Beijing sauce, old Beijing zhajiangmian, etc.

…and more regional flavors in development!

## ✨ Features

Unique Food Effects – Not just for hunger: some foods grant temporary status buffs (e.g., Speed, Strength, Luck, etc.).

Crafting – Some foods can be crafted at a crafting table, while rarer ones require more complex recipes.

Continuous Updates – The mod is under active development, regularly adding new foods, mechanics, and improvements.

**Note: If you encounter any issues while playing, please open an issue on [GitHub](https://github.com/xiaomian124/A-Better-Foods/issues) .**

## ⚒️ Recommended Companion

For a better crafting experience, it is highly recommended to use [JEI (Just Enough Items)](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei) alongside this mod!
